title: Post by the.alchemist
description:
Metacognition is one of those words that sounds clinical until you realize what it actually means. It's the ability to observe your own mind while it's operating, to watch a thought arise and recognize it as a thought rather than reality.

Researchers at University College London found that people with higher metacognitive ability have more gray matter in the anterior prefrontal cortex, the part of the brain responsible for self-reflection and decision-making.

 This isn't just a personality trait you're born with or without. Studies show metacognition can be developed through deliberate practice, meaning the witness that's been inside you this whole time can be strengthened like a muscle. 

Every wisdom tradition has pointed to this capacity in its own language, but now we have the science to back it up. The question is whether you'll keep living inside your thoughts or finally step back and meet the part of you that's been watching all along.

#metacognition #neuroscience #selfawareness
